AppNotes:
Run this command after fresh install: 'sed -i '$d' /app/www/public/config/config.php && cat <<EOL >> /app/www/public/config/config.php
  'trusted_proxies' =>
  array (
    0 => '127.0.0.1',
  ),
  'forwarded_for_headers' =>
  array (
    0 => 'HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR',
  ),
  'overwriteprotocol' => 'https',
  'backgroundjobs_mode' => 'cron',
  'maintenance_window_start' => '02:00',
);
EOL'
